---
title: "Unit V: Spring Boot and REST APIs"
subtitle: "Lectures 33-40 - Spring Boot setup, REST design, CRUD APIs, and final integration"
---

## Block Overview

This block covers the final major course segment: Spring Boot application setup, REST controller design, request mapping, CRUD APIs, project structure, and final integration practice.

**Course Outcome:** CO-5 (K5-K6 - Synthesis & Evaluation)  
**Lectures Covered:** 33-40  
**Final Project Due:** Apr 19  
**End-Semester Exam:** Apr 21-May 3

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
## Quick Practice Quizzes (Lectures 33-40)
Use the [Quiz Hub](/quiz/index.qmd) or jump directly to:

- [Lecture 33 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-33-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 34 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-34-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 35 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-35-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 36 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-36-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 37 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-37-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 38 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-38-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 39 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-39-quiz.qmd)
- [Lecture 40 Quiz](/quiz/lecture-40-quiz.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
This week uses upcoming lecture decks. Use the [Lectures Index](/lectures/index.qmd) for all available slides.
:::

---

## Lecture 33: Spring Boot Configuration & Setup {#lecture-33}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-33-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-33.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-33.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Topics Covered
- Spring Boot project structure
- `@SpringBootApplication`
- Embedded server model
- Configuration via `application.properties`
- Maven and Gradle based setup

---

## Lecture 34: Spring Boot Annotations & Build Systems {#lecture-34}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-34-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-34.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-34.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Common Annotations
- `@SpringBootApplication`
- `@Configuration`
- `@ComponentScan`
- `@EnableAutoConfiguration`
- `@RestController`
- `@RequestMapping`

### Build Tool Focus
- Maven coordinates dependencies through `pom.xml`
- Gradle uses declarative build scripts
- Starters simplify dependency selection

---

## Lecture 35: Spring Boot Actuator, Runners & Logging {#lecture-35}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-35-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-35.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-35.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Operations Topics
- Application runners
- Logging levels and structured logs
- Actuator endpoints such as `/health` and `/metrics`
- Why observability matters in production apps

---

## Lecture 36: REST Controllers & Request Mapping {#lecture-36}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-36-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-36.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-36.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Request Mapping Topics
- `@RestController`
- `@GetMapping`, `@PostMapping`, `@PutMapping`, `@DeleteMapping`
- URL path design
- Mapping JSON request and response bodies

## Lecture 37: Request Body, Path Variable & Request Parameter {#lecture-37}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-37-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-37.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-37.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Parameter Handling Topics
- `@RequestBody` for JSON payloads
- `@PathVariable` for resource identifiers
- `@RequestParam` for query-string data
- Validation of incoming data

## Lecture 38: HTTP Methods & CRUD APIs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) {#lecture-38}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-38-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-38.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-38.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### CRUD API Topics
- Mapping create, read, update, delete to HTTP verbs
- Status codes for success and failure cases
- Designing consistent endpoints for collections and single resources

## Lecture 39: Spring Boot Code Structure & Best Practices {#lecture-39}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-39-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-39.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-39.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Best Practice Topics
- Layered package structure
- Separation of controller, service, and repository code
- DTO usage and validation
- Naming, logging, and maintainability guidelines

## Lecture 40: Final Revision & Hands-on Integration (Spring Boot + REST) {#lecture-40}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Lecture Materials
[{{< fa list-check >}} Take Quiz](/quiz/lecture-40-quiz.qmd)
[{{< fa desktop >}} View Lecture](/lectures/lecture-40.qmd){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ratio ratio-16x9 mb-3">
  <iframe class="lecture-preview-frame" src="/lectures/lecture-40.html" title="Lecture presentation preview" loading="lazy" style="border: 1px solid #343a40;" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
```
:::

### Final Integration Focus
- Connect REST endpoints to service and repository layers
- Review common controller patterns and error handling
- Prepare for project assembly and viva-style explanation

## Key Takeaways

- Spring Boot reduces setup friction for Java web apps  
- REST APIs rely on clear routing, data mapping, and HTTP semantics  
- Clean project structure improves maintenance and team collaboration  
- The final lectures consolidate Unit V into project-ready practice
